subject: Write bats tests for shell scripts
description:
Write comprehensive bats (Bash Automated Testing System) tests for all three shell scripts: `validate-result.sh`, `watch-for-results.sh`, and `poll-for-results.sh`.

**What to implement:**

1. Ensure bats is available (`brew install bats-core` if needed)
2. Create test directory structure under `claude/sdd-tools/tests/`
3. Write test fixtures (valid/invalid result files, context files)
4. Write test suites:

**validate-result.sh tests (8 scenarios):**
- Valid PASS result → file preserved
- Valid FAIL result → file preserved
- Missing status line → file renamed to .invalid
- Invalid status value (status: UNKNOWN) → .invalid
- Missing required section (no ## Summary) → .invalid
- Missing context file → stub context created, result accepted
- Non-session file write → hook ignores
- Hook error (malformed input) → trap catches, exit 0

**watch-for-results.sh tests (5 scenarios):**
- All results found → ALL_DONE output, exit 0
- Timeout with no files → exit 1
- No fswatch available → exit 2
- Pre-existing results → detected and counted
- Partial completion → reports found, exits 1

**poll-for-results.sh tests (5 scenarios):**
- Adaptive interval increase → 5s, 10s, 15s, 20s, 25s, 30s progression
- Interval reset on new result → resets to 5s
- Max interval cap → never exceeds 30s
- Environment variable override → POLL_START_INTERVAL=10 starts at 10s
- Timeout → exit 1

**Files to create:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/tests/validate-result.bats` (new)
- `claude/sdd-tools/tests/watch-for-results.bats` (new)
- `claude/sdd-tools/tests/poll-for-results.bats` (new)
- `claude/sdd-tools/tests/fixtures/` — test fixture files (new directory)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] All 8 validate-result.sh test scenarios pass
- [ ] All 5 watch-for-results.sh test scenarios pass
- [ ] All 5 poll-for-results.sh test scenarios pass
- [ ] Test fixtures include valid and invalid result files
- [ ] Tests use temp directories for isolation (cleanup in teardown)

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Tests work on macOS (zsh/bash environment)
- [ ] Tests mock fswatch/inotifywait availability for watch-for-results.sh tests
- [ ] Tests use short timeouts for fast execution

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Each test cleans up temp files in teardown
- [ ] Failed tests report clear error messages

**Testing Requirements:**
• Self-validating: `bats claude/sdd-tools/tests/` runs all tests
• All 18 test scenarios pass

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 10
activeForm: Writing bats tests for shell scripts
